case.narrative: I found a listing and they want a deposit before viewing. I’m worried it’s a scam and I also have a notice with a deadline.
unknowns: What platform is the listing on?
What is the deadline date on the notice?

updates: Key facts are missing; treat recommendations as verification steps.
Fraud risk flagged; avoid sending money or sensitive info until verified.
Deadline risk flagged; confirm dates from the notice/artifact.

battle_buddy_plan.situation:
I found a listing and they want a deposit before viewing. I’m worried it’s a scam and I also have a notice with a deadline.
Risk flags: housing risk, deadline risk, fraud risk.
battle_buddy_plan.goal: Get to a safe, realistic housing plan with verified facts.
next_3_actions: Answer the top 3 unknowns that block the next step (who/where/program/timeline).
Check for any written deadlines (notice, email, portal message) and record dates.
Collect the minimum proof set (see Evidence needed) and redact sensitive identifiers.
evidence_needed: Any written notice(s) (eviction/termination/shutoff): photo/PDF with dates visible (redact identifiers).
Lease or rental agreement (if applicable), redacted.
Relevant email/text thread screenshots showing dates/requests (redact phone numbers if needed).
Any letter/screenshot that confirms the program involved (if any), or who you’re working with.
A one-page timeline: key dates, who you contacted, outcomes.
risks_traps: Key unknowns can cause wasted effort; verify before making irreversible moves.
Fraud risk: don’t send money (wire, gift cards, crypto) or sensitive info until you verify identity and ownership.
If someone is pressuring you to pay to apply/view, treat it as a red flag and verify via independent channels.
Privacy: don’t share SSN, bank details, passwords/MFA codes, or full unredacted DD-214 in messages.
Use redactions (last-4 only) when sharing documents or screenshots.
if_blocked_do_this: If you get stuck, collect the missing document or ask the responsible agency for the exact requirement in writing.
